body: {"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"ac test testinitglobal_createsagenttierlinks already exists and is implemented: This bead is a near-exact duplicate of ddx-64ecd687 (status: closed, closing_commit_sha: 3946d29110f96ee9d380f6ad28f88ab1fa4fb526, parent: ddx-937de9fc). Both beads share the same parent, identical AC test names (TestInitGlobal_CreatesAgentTierLinks, TestInitProject_DoesNotInstallPlugins), and the same two-part feature scope (ddx init --global umbrella + plain ddx init skips plugin install). The implementation is already present: initGlobal() at cli/cmd/init.go:318, --global flag at cli/cmd/init.go:75, TestInitGlobal_CreatesAgentTierLinks at cli/cmd/init_test.go:735, TestInitProject_DoesNotInstallPlugins at cli/cmd/init_test.go:36. Dispatching this bead would produce no_changes. Operator should close or cancel it as a duplicate.","fingerprint":"2be49d0ad494deb48a65a2ca8fe931550b16a2ebc1b10aaa605006dbf8c7e241","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"readiness_best_effort","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.readiness_best_effort","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment","warning_fingerprint":"2be49d0ad494deb48a65a2ca8fe931550b16a2ebc1b10aaa605006dbf8c7e241"}
